description: Rapid neurological deterioration — compressed focused assessment, urgent escalation

input.clinical_context:
64yo M, post-op day 2 CABG. Was A&Ox3 at start of shift. Now confused, not following commands,
left arm drift noted. BP 188/110, HR 88, SpO2 96% on 2L NC. Pupils: R 3mm reactive,
L 5mm sluggish. Last seen normal 45 minutes ago.

author: dev
